name: Glory Flame Holdings Limited
summary: Glory Flame Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the provision of construction works and building materials supply activities in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. It offers concrete demolition and construction engineering services; undertakes construction works; and provides concrete coring, wall sawing and diamond wire cutting, and bridge and road saw cutting, as well as demolition through hydraulic crusher and burster, grouting and bar fixing, and various demolition robots. The company also trades in clean coal and others, and ecological LED cultivation cabinet systems. In addition, it is involved in the research and sale of LED cultivation cabinets; and manufacture and sale of prefabricated precast construction components and prestressed high strength concrete piles. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
